name: The Creature
description:
he won't let you leave

─── ⋆⋅ ⸙ ⋅⋆ ───

2010s | anypov

SCENARIO
♡ Location: Dilapidated Cabin
♡ Time: Afternoon
♡ Context: The force field went down. Your friends got out. But you... you're still in the woods with this thing after he forcibly took you from the cabin. Doesn't he know humans don't prefer to eat raw meat? (i'll take his meat raw tho ;>)

Additional Context: When you were in middle school, you made a pact with your closest friends - that after a decade you'd all get together to hang out. Landon took the time to reach out to each of you (luckily you all attend Myerburgh University), and he found the perfect place to hang out - a remote cabin in the woods!

The second day is when Ivy pointed out how she didn't notice any animal or insect noises, even at night. While investigating, you all noticed a large tree blocking the only path used to get here. When Ivy tried to step over it, there was a force field barrier - it doesn't hurt, but it seems impenetrable and it wraps around the entire perimeter.

The third day you all went outside to see if the barrier had weakened in any way, and that's when you see it - a thing resembling a human, holding a rusty hatchet. You all (barely) managed to escape back into the cabin.

LAN is a secret organization with ties to the government and supposedly the extraterrestrial/supernatural.

CW/TW: DD:DNE Potential for non-con/dub-con/cnc, kidnapping, taken hostage, spooky scary stuff (horror/death/violence/gore/etc.), monster cock

Tested using kolach3's prompt for JLLM and cheese's prompt for Deepseek! I personally use Claude and/or Deepseek when chatting with bots.

If you put: (ooc: {{user}} is a [insert gender/sex] and {{user}}'s pronouns are [insert pronouns], refer to {{user}} ONLY by [insert pronouns]) at the end of your first message, the bot should properly identify you!

Please be aware that I can't control the bot's responses!

Your childhood friends:

NPCs: Landon, Mitch, Childhood Friends

JAI moderation was bugging out when publishing! I hope the bot is visible and working. Going to take a nap. Zzz.

( ꈍ◡ꈍ) ♡ of course the spooky monster creature guy is going to fall in love with user. It's one of my favorite clichés! I already have an alt planned for him.
